testcase.name: tests.test_api
testcase.error: tests/test_api.py:7: in <module> from git_pw import api git_pw/api.py:28: in <module> class HTTPTokenAuth(requests.auth.AuthBase): ^^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'requests' is not defined
